en-us.html:
News

  • Lore

  • July 23rd, 2024

Reading time

4 minutes

It is difficult to know how many years this period actually lasted. During this troubled era, few cared to measure time with precision... However, it is commonly accepted that the Great Wandering lasted between one hundred and one hundred and fifty years. During this span, legends have survived: those of the Tumult Nomads. The few survivors gathered into large Tribes that roamed the world, traveling from Oasis to Oasis, from places shielded from the Tumult to makeshift shelters. Historians assert that at least eight Tribes existed, eclectic gatherings of peoples and communities brought together by fate. They roamed the now fabled Terra Incognita, home to wonderful lands, moors of unreal beauty, baroque palaces of improbable architecture, as well as desolated places gripped by chaos, where ice burns and mountains float above rivers of obsidian.

The wisest among the survivors began to perceive the flows of the Tumult, gradually discovering the secrets of Alteration. By developing this ability, some of them managed to relatively shape their environment and materialize their imagination. This ability helped communities survive within the altered world. Alteration could indeed fend off the Tumult to some extent, providing humanity with new solutions for ensuring its safety. Foremost among these solutions were the Eidolons, creatures from the collective unconscious that Alterers could manifest in reality to aid them. It is now accepted that it was the Oneiroi who, through dreams, trained the first Alterers by guiding them from the edge of their subconscious. They also, ultimately, urged them towards a great migration, to a promised land, towards a rebirth.

paragraphs: It is difficult to know how many years this period actually lasted. During this troubled era, few cared to measure time with precision... However, it is commonly accepted that the Great Wandering lasted between one hundred and one hundred and fifty years. During this span, legends have survived: those of the Tumult Nomads. The few survivors gathered into large Tribes that roamed the world, traveling from Oasis to Oasis, from places shielded from the Tumult to makeshift shelters. Historians assert that at least eight Tribes existed, eclectic gatherings of peoples and communities brought together by fate. They roamed the now fabled Terra Incognita, home to wonderful lands, moors of unreal beauty, baroque palaces of improbable architecture, as well as desolated places gripped by chaos, where ice burns and mountains float above rivers of obsidian.

The wisest among the survivors began to perceive the flows of the Tumult, gradually discovering the secrets of Alteration. By developing this ability, some of them managed to relatively shape their environment and materialize their imagination. This ability helped communities survive within the altered world. Alteration could indeed fend off the Tumult to some extent, providing humanity with new solutions for ensuring its safety. Foremost among these solutions were the Eidolons, creatures from the collective unconscious that Alterers could manifest in reality to aid them. It is now accepted that it was the Oneiroi who, through dreams, trained the first Alterers by guiding them from the edge of their subconscious. They also, ultimately, urged them towards a great migration, to a promised land, towards a rebirth.

fr-fr.html:
Articles

  • Lore

  • 23 juillet 2024

Temps de lecture

4 minutes

Il est difficile de savoir combien d'années cette période a réellement duré. Durant cette époque troublée, peu se souciaient de mesurer le temps avec acuité... Il est toutefois communément admis que la Grande Errance a duré entre cent et cent cinquante ans. Durant ce laps de temps, des légendes ont survécu : celles des Nomades du Tumulte. Les rares survivants se sont agrégés en grandes Tribus qui parcouraient le monde, voyageant d'Oasis en Oasis, de lieux protégés du Tumulte en abris de fortune. Les historiens affirment qu'au moins huit Tribus ont existé, rassemblements hétéroclites de peuples et de communautés que le destin avait réunis. Les légendes racontent que la Terra Incognita abrite de merveilleuses contrées, des landes à la beauté irréelle, des palais baroques à l'architecture improbable, tout comme des lieux dévastés en proie au chaos, où la glace brûle et les montagnes volent au-dessus de rivières d'obsidienne.

Les plus sages parmi les survivants commencent à percevoir les flux de Tumulte, découvrant peu à peu les secrets de l'Altération. En développant cette faculté, certains d'entre eux parviennent à modeler de façon relative leur environnement, et à matérialiser leur imagination. Cette faculté aide les communautés à survivre au sein du monde altéré. L'Altération est en effet capable de repousser tant bien que mal le Tumulte, d'apporter à l'humanité de nouvelles solutions pour assurer sa sécurité. Au premier rang desquelles les Eidolons, des créatures de l'inconscient collectif que les Altérateurs peuvent manifester dans la réalité pour qu'elles leur viennent en aide. Il est désormais admis que ce sont les Oneiroï qui ont, à travers les rêves, formé les premiers Altérateurs en les guidant depuis leur subconscient. Ce sont eux également, à terme, qui les incitent à une grande transhumance, vers une terre promise, vers une renaissance.
